ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clinical trial */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors associated with the trial */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the trial was published */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the trial took place */,
  "subjects" TEXT /* Subjects involved in the trial (intervention/control) */,
  "age_intervention" TEXT /* Age distribution of participants in the intervention group */,
  "age_control" TEXT /* Age distribution of participants in the control group */,
  "surgery_type" TEXT /* Type of surgery performed */,
  "intervention" TEXT /* Type of intervention (somatostatin analog used) */,
  "control" TEXT /* Control measures used in the trial */,
  "publication_status" TEXT /* Publication status (e.g., published, unpublished) */,
  "trial_status" TEXT /* Current status of the trial (e.g., ongoing, completed, suspended) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trial */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trial */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the trial */,
  "ethical_approval" TEXT /* Whether ethical approval has been obtained (e.g., yes, no) */,
  "data_version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes in the trial data */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the trial data */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the trial data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_country FOREIGN KEY ("country") REFERENCES countries ("country_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_surgery_type FOREIGN KEY ("surgery_type") REFERENCES surgery_types ("surgery_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_control FOREIGN KEY ("control") REFERENCES controls ("control_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_intervention FOREIGN KEY ("intervention") REFERENCES interventions ("intervention_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "healthcare_system" TEXT /* Description of the healthcare system in the country */,
  "gdp_per_capita" TEXT /* GDP per capita of the country */,
  "health_expenditure" TEXT /* Health expenditure as a percentage of GDP */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "surgery_types" (
  "surgery_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of surgery */,
  "surgery_name" TEXT /* Name of the surgery */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the surgery */,
  "common_indications" TEXT /* Common medical indications for the surgery */,
  "average_cost" TEXT /* Average cost of the surgery */,
  "recovery_time" INTEGER /* Average recovery time in days */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("surgery_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interventions" (
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intervention */,
  "intervention_name" TEXT /* Name of the intervention */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the intervention */,
  "dose_range" TEXT /* Range of doses administered in the trial */,
  "administration_route" TEXT /* Route of administration (e.g., oral, intravenous) */,
  "side_effects" TEXT /* Common side effects of the intervention */,
  "effectiveness_rate" TEXT /* Rate of effectiveness based on initial studies */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intervention_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "controls" (
  "control_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each control measure */,
  "control_name" TEXT /* Name of the control measure */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the control measure */,
  "control_type" TEXT /* Type of control (e.g., placebo, standard treatment) */,
  "control_effectiveness" TEXT /* Effectiveness of the control measure */,
  "control_side_effects" TEXT /* Common side effects of the control measure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("control_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clinical trial being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the trial data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the trial data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event */,
  "access_reason" TEXT /* Reason for accessing the trial data (e.g., research, review) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or division the user belongs to */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution or organization the user is affiliated with */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
